caption: A series of presentation slides for a course on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" are shown. Each slide contains a blue header with the text "Tutorial – 1" and a footer indicating the instructor, "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay," alongside an NPTEL logo. The central focus of the slides is a mathematical equation for y, expressed as a fraction: y = ((h₁ - h₂) - (1 - ε)(h₁ - h_g)) / ((h₁ - h_γ) - (1 - ε)(h₁ - h_g)). The visuals remain static across the first three frames. In the final frame, the text "ε₁ = 1" appears to the right of the main equation, indicating a specific condition or substitution being introduced into the problem. The background of the slides is a plain white, and the overall appearance is that of a digital lecture presentation.
